subcategory: WebGL animated shader background with procedural noise
use_cases: Full-page hero section animated backgrounds for landing pages
Dynamic ambient backgrounds for SaaS applications
Visually engaging backgrounds for creative portfolio sites
Atmospheric hero backgrounds for media and entertainment sites
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered animated shader background component using Three.js that renders procedural noise-based flowing patterns with subtle camera shake effects. The shader uses fractional Brownian motion (fbm) with 3 octaves for organic, continuously evolving visuals. Perfect for creating immersive hero sections and landing page backgrounds with modern, dynamic aesthetics.
